\tzpentry{ID4454}{Magnetic Helicity Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4454 introduces Magnetic Helicity Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{M}_{\mu\nu} = \frac{c^4}{8\pi G} \left( G_{\mu\nu} + \Lambda g_{\mu\nu} - \Phi_{\text{TZP}} \cdot g_{\mu\nu}^{\text{TZP}} \right) \equiv \mathcal{T}_{\mu\nu}^{\text{metric}} \cdot \chi_T$$
